notableEvents.label: Jorge Barrosa pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jorge Barrosa flies out to center fielder Andy Pages.

notableEvents.label: Ketel Marte walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Ketel Marte homers (11) on a fly ball to left field.

notableEvents.label: Max Muncy GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Max Muncy grounds into a double play, first baseman Ildemaro Vargas to shortstop Geraldo Perdomo. Will Smith out at 2nd. Max Muncy out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Will Smith GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Will Smith grounds into a double play, shortstop Geraldo Perdomo to second baseman Ketel Marte to first baseman Ildemaro Vargas. Kyle Tucker out at 2nd. Will Smith out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Miguel Rojas pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Rojas lines out sharply to left fielder Tommy Troy.
